# Generated by uniffi-bindgen-react-native
cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.9.0)
project(RrnMobileFfi)

set (CMAKE_VERBOSE_MAKEFILE ON)
set (CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD 17)

# Resolve the path to the uniffi-bindgen-react-native package.
#
# ubrn generates a `node -p "require.resolve('uniffi-bindgen-react-native/package.json')"`
# here, which CANNOT work: that package's own `exports` map declares only ".",
# so Node >=16 refuses the `./package.json` subpath with
# ERR_PACKAGE_PATH_NOT_EXPORTED. With no RESULT_VARIABLE the failure was
# swallowed, leaving the path empty and the compiler reading `-I/cpp/includes`
# — which surfaces much later as a bogus "'UniffiCallInvoker.h' file not found".
# Search the directory tree instead: no dependency on node being on the Gradle
# daemon's PATH (nvm's is not), and no silent empty string.
# NO_CMAKE_FIND_ROOT_PATH is required: the NDK toolchain sets
# CMAKE_FIND_ROOT_PATH_MODE_INCLUDE=ONLY, which would otherwise re-root these
# absolute paths under the prefab sysroot and never find them.
find_path(UNIFFI_BINDGEN_INCLUDES
    NAMES UniffiCallInvoker.h
    PATHS
        ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/../../node_modules/uniffi-bindgen-react-native/cpp/includes
        ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/../../../node_modules/uniffi-bindgen-react-native/cpp/includes
    NO_DEFAULT_PATH
    NO_CMAKE_FIND_ROOT_PATH
)
if(NOT UNIFFI_BINDGEN_INCLUDES)
    message(FATAL_ERROR
        "Could not find uniffi-bindgen-react-native's cpp/includes. Is the "
        "package installed (yarn install)?")
endif()

# Specifies a path to native header files.
include_directories(
    ../../cpp

    ${UNIFFI_BINDGEN_INCLUDES}
)

add_library(rrn-mobile-ffi            SHARED
    ../../cpp/rrn-mobile-ffi.cpp
    ../../cpp/rrn_mobile_ffi.cpp
    cpp-adapter.cpp
)

# Set C++ compiler flags
set(CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS "${CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS} -O2")
set(CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS "${CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS} -fexceptions")
set(CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS "${CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS} -frtti")
set(CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS "${CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS} -fstack-protector-all")
set(CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS "${CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS} -Wall")
set(CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS "${CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS} -Werror")

# Set linker flags for 16KB page size alignment (required for Android 15+)
set(CMAKE_SHARED_LINKER_FLAGS "${CMAKE_SHARED_LINKER_FLAGS} -Wl,-z,max-page-size=16384")

cmake_path(
  SET MY_RUST_LIB
  ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/src/main/jniLibs/${ANDROID_ABI}/librrn_mobile_ffi.a
  NORMALIZE
)
if(NOT EXISTS ${MY_RUST_LIB})
    message(FATAL_ERROR
        "No Rust staticlib for ${ANDROID_ABI} at ${MY_RUST_LIB}. Run "
        "`yarn ubrn:android` to cross-compile it (add `-t ${ANDROID_ABI}` if "
        "that ABI is not in ubrn.config.yaml's android.targets).")
endif()

add_library(my_rust_lib STATIC IMPORTED)
set_target_properties(my_rust_lib PROPERTIES IMPORTED_LOCATION ${MY_RUST_LIB})

# Add ReactAndroid libraries, being careful to account for different versions.
find_package(ReactAndroid REQUIRED CONFIG)
find_library(LOGCAT log)

# REACTNATIVE_MERGED_SO seems to be only be set in a build.gradle.kt file,
# which we don't use. Thus falling back to version number sniffing.
if (ReactAndroid_VERSION_MINOR GREATER_EQUAL 76)
  set(REACTNATIVE_MERGED_SO true)
endif()

# https://github.com/react-native-community/discussions-and-proposals/discussions/816
# This if-then-else can be removed once this library does not support version below 0.76
if (REACTNATIVE_MERGED_SO)
  target_link_libraries(rrn-mobile-ffi ReactAndroid::reactnative)
else()
  target_link_libraries(rrn-mobile-ffi
    ReactAndroid::turbomodulejsijni
    ReactAndroid::react_nativemodule_core
  )
endif()

find_package(fbjni REQUIRED CONFIG)
target_link_libraries(
  rrn-mobile-ffi
  fbjni::fbjni
  ReactAndroid::jsi
  ${LOGCAT}
  my_rust_lib
)
